{"query":"SpaceXAI Grok For Government US customers launch","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1699,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://enterpriseai.economictimes.indiatimes.com/news/industry/spacexs-grok-struggles-to-gain-traction-with-us-government-threatening-ai-ambitions/131257260","title":"SpaceX's Grok Struggles to Gain Traction with U.S. Government, Threatening AI Ambitions, ETEnterpriseai","content":"Grok ⁠has been available ⁠to federal agencies for eight months at a cost of 42 cents per agency.
But xAI's Grok chatbot has been a flop with one of the world's largest customers - the US government, according to seven federal employees, three contracting experts and a Reuters review of government AI inventory documents.
The 2025 consolidated inventory records from federal agencies show more than 400 publicly identified examples of AI use in government that name a specific vendor.
By contrast, 234 examples involved technology based on OpenAI's models, including ChatGPT, Codex, and Microsoft Copilot; 33 involved Gemini or other Alphabet products; and 26 involved Anthropic's Claude, which has since been blacklisted by the Trump administration.
The Office of Management and Budget(OMB), which collated the records, did not respond to requests for comment. xAI did not respond to detailed questions from Reuters about Grok's use in government.
Google declined comment and referred Reuters ‌to blog posts highlighting its government work.
"Without government validation, the $1.75 trillion valuation looks less like a floor and more like a high ceiling." SpaceX chief executive Elon Musk has publicly touted Grok's potential for federal work and lobbied for its widespread adoption.
The AI inventory data collected by OMB provides a window into how federal agencies deploy the technology.
Last month, xAI lost a bid to build a Grok-powered product for the Department of Veterans Affairs, according to a person familiar with the matter.
### Follow us for the latest news, insider access to events and more."},{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2025/09/25/elon-musks-xai-offers-grok-to-federal-government-for-42-cents/","title":"Elon Musk's xAI offers Grok to federal government for 42 cents | TechCrunch","content":"Elon Musk’s xAI offers Grok to federal government for 42 cents
The steep discount for federal agencies includes access to xAI engineers to help integrate the technology.
During that time, Musk placed several aides at the GSA and other government agencies responsible for regulating or awarding government contracts in industries in which Musk has business.

SpaceX's acquisition of xAI for $250 billion, announced in late March 2026, is the largest technology acquisition in history -- surpassing Microsoft's $69 billion purchase of Activision Blizzard by a factor of 3.6.
Grok's ability to process and interpret this data stream has applications in insurance, logistics, and government intelligence.
The Claude Mythos 5 launch (10 trillion parameters, focused on security and research) appears designed to extend Anthropic's lead in precisely the domains where Grok is weakest.

{"query":"SpaceXAI Grok For Government US customers launch","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://x.ai/news/government","title":"Announcing xAI for Government | SpaceXAI","content":"We are excited to announce xAI For Government – a suite of frontier AI products available first to United States Government customers. Today, we’re proud to announce **xAI For Government** – a suite of frontier AI products available to United States Government customers. xAI’s mission is to create and propagate AI tools to assist humanity in our quest for understanding and knowledge. Supporting the critical missions of the United States Government is a key part of this mission – bringing the best tools and technologies available in the commercial world to our hard-working public servants. Under the umbrella of xAI For Government, we will be bringing all of our world-class AI tools to federal, local, state, and national security customers. These customers will be able to use the Grok family of products to accelerate America – from making everyday government services faster and more efficient to using AI to address unsolved problems in fundamental science and technology.","score":0.8319231,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.govconwire.com/articles/xai-grok-for-government-frontier-ai-model-grok-4-national-security","title":"Elon Musk’s xAI Launches Grok For Government","content":"Elon Musk-backed xAI unveiled a suite of frontier AI products for the U.S. government. Home Artificial Intelligence Elon Musk’s xAI Launches Grok For Government. # Elon Musk’s xAI Launches Grok For Government. Artificial intelligence startup xAI has unveiled a suite of frontier AI products, dubbed Grok For Government, designed to support the critical missions of the U.S. government. Under the Grok For Government umbrella, the company said Monday it will bring frontier AI models like Grok 4 and commercial offerings such as Deep Search and Tool Use to national security, federal, state and local government customers to accelerate service delivery and address science and technology challenges. The launch of Grok for Government coincides with the award of a Department of Defense contract to xAI. CDAO said the partnerships will expand the department’s use of frontier AI capabilities and improve the ability of companies to address critical national security needs.","score":0.8051581,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fe9Gz6TvXFA","title":"Grok is now working with the US government; DOD awards mega contracts for new ‘frontier AI’ projects","content":"Grok is now working with the US government; DOD awards mega contracts for new ‘frontier AI’ projects
FedScoop
12900 subscribers
8 likes
258 views
15 Jul 2025
xAI, the artificial intelligence company led by Elon Musk, announced new efforts Monday to get its generative AI tool, Grok, into the hands of federal government officials. In a post to X, the company announced “Grok for Government,” which it described as a suite of products aimed at U.S. government customers. FedScoop reported on the General Services Administration’s interest in Grok last week.

Anthropic, Google and xAI will join OpenAI on the CDAO’s nascent effort to partner with industry on pioneering artificial intelligence projects focused on national security applications.
